title: NHKマイルCの後に・急旋回！

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! I thought I was gonna shock the world
with a record time!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm amazing! A genius—the fastest in the
world! But well...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm on the scoreboard at least. That'll do for
today.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Did you see me, Trainer?! I was soaring with all
my might!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa's expectations and ideals far
exceed anyone else's. Sometimes, they feel as
infinite as the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she did excellent today. In fact, if her
stamina can withstand a race like that...
choice_data_list: How are you feeling, El? Tired?
How are you feeling, El? Tired?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? Tired? I'm totally fine.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm tough as nails and always ready 'cause of all
the spicy food I eat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her feet are steady. She really might have what it
takes to make her dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She once mentioned her desire to compete with
her rivals in her classic year. At least once, I want
that dream to come true.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well then, Trainer, what race should we shoot for
next? I'm guessing something in the fall?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: If we go for the fall, I can run with the seniors...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Qué? Um, Trainer... Did I hear you right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I thought I just heard you say the Derby...
choice_data_list: That's right! Let's go to the Japanese Derby!
That's right! Let's go to the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her again with more vigor. It'll be a difficult
race, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby... The Derby... But that's like
right after this!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is incredible! I thought I had to choose
between the Derby and the NHK Mile Cup...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Is it really okay, Trainer?!
choice_data_list: If you're feeling up to it.
If you're feeling up to it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'm feelin' better than ever after
hearing this!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno! Bueno! Bueno, bueno, buenooo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I can run in the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: With all my beloved friends!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"El Condor Pasa Hits the Derby!" The news
spreads quickly throughout Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Grass... did you hear the news?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea either. I guess El talked with her
trainer and decided on impulse.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whaaam!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El! We need to talk!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah, Spe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I... decided to go to the Derby all of a sudden!
Um...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Is that okay with you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've always wanted to run with you in the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Let's have an awesome race! You and me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Spe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You know it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Turns out they all wanted this race to happen. El
Condor Pasa no longer has a reason to feel like
she's intruding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is hope they have an amazing
race—one where they battle it out with
everything they've got... on the biggest stage of
the Classics.
